raw_text:
再分离 $Y(\theta,\varphi) = \Theta(\theta)\Phi(\varphi)$.
$\Phi \frac{1}{\sin\theta} \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) + \Theta \frac{1}{\sin^2\theta} \partial_\varphi^2 \Phi + \Theta \Phi l(l+1) = 0$.
$\frac{\sin\theta}{\Theta} \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) + \frac{1}{\Phi} \partial_\varphi^2 \Phi + l(l+1) \sin^2\theta = 0$.
$\frac{\sin\theta}{\Theta} \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) + l(l+1) \sin^2\theta = -\frac{1}{\Phi} \partial_\varphi^2 \Phi$ 三入
$\sin\theta \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) + [l(l+1) \sin^2\theta - \lambda] \Theta = 0$.
$\frac{1}{\sin\theta} \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) + \left[l(l+1) - \frac{\lambda}{\sin^2\theta}\right] \Theta = 0$.
令 $x = \cos\theta$，$\frac{1}{\sin\theta} \partial_\theta = -\frac{\partial}{\partial \cos\theta} = -\frac{\partial}{\partial x}$
故 $\frac{1}{\sin\theta} \partial_\theta (\sin\theta \partial_\theta \Theta) = -\partial_x (\sin^2\theta (-\partial_x \Theta)) = \partial_x ((1-x^2) \partial_x \Theta)$
$\partial_x ((1-x^2) \partial_x \Theta) + \left[l(l+1) - \frac{m^2}{\sin^2\theta}\right] \Theta = 0$. ($\lambda = m^2$ 来源见后文)
这是 $l$ 阶连带勒让德方程
$m=0$ 时是 $l$ 阶勒让德方程.
$\partial_x ((1-x^2) \partial_x \Theta) + l(l+1) \Theta = 0$.
$(1-x^2) \partial_x^2 \Theta - 2x \partial_x \Theta + l(l+1) \Theta = 0$.
图片为方格纸背景的手写推导内容，主要为黑色墨水书写，包含多行数学公式与中文说明文字；其中第四行公式右侧有红色手写标注“三入”；整体布局为自上而下的推导流程，从分离变量开始，逐步推导至连带勒让德方程及勒让德方程形式。
